entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Deficient Notice and Adverse Housing Action
entries.task: Identify the precise Oregon notice, termination, displacement, relocation, and hearing authorities governing the challenged notices.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Deficient Notice and Adverse Housing Action
entries.task: Locate the controlling lease clause or voucher/program document that set the notice requirements actually applicable to plaintiffs.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Deficient Notice and Adverse Housing Action
entries.task: Identify whether Count I is best anchored in section 1983 due process, a federal housing statute, or a federal program-rule notice theory.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Deficient Notice and Adverse Housing Action
entries.task: Locate the exact federal housing regulation, statute, handbook, or guidance source governing the challenged notice or displacement process.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Documentation Demands and Intake Barriers
entries.task: Identify the strongest Oregon discrimination, retaliation, or unfair housing-process authority applicable to documentation demands and intake barriers.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Documentation Demands and Intake Barriers
entries.task: Locate the rule, lease term, or program condition that limited what documentation HACC could require from plaintiffs.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Documentation Demands and Intake Barriers
entries.task: Identify the strongest federal fair-housing, retaliation, or federally improper administration authority applicable to the documentation demands.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Documentation Demands and Intake Barriers
entries.task: Locate the federal housing-program verification or intake rule that the challenged demands allegedly exceeded or violated.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Lease, Occupancy, and Displacement Conduct
entries.task: Identify the lease, occupancy, inspection, transfer, and housing-program authorities that defined HACC's obligations for the challenged conduct.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Lease, Occupancy, and Displacement Conduct
entries.task: Determine whether this count should be split into separate lease-breach and housing-process counts under Oregon law.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Lease, Occupancy, and Displacement Conduct
entries.task: Identify the exact federal housing-program regulation, contract condition, or program guidance governing the lease, occupancy, inspection, or displacement conduct at issue.

entries.title: Potential Claim Theme: Lease, Occupancy, and Displacement Conduct
entries.task: Determine whether Count III has a sufficiently concrete federal hook or should instead be preserved only as supplemental Oregon-law pleading.
